case_title: TORGERSON ROBERT VS GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE HIGHWAY&TRANSPORTATION DISTRICT

docket_entries.description: DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT FILED BY DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE HIGHWAY&TRANSPORTATION DISTRICT
MONEY CLAIM OF PLAINTIFF FOR $5,000.00 FILED BY TORGERSON ROBERT AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE HIGHWAY&TRANSPORTATION DISTRICT ORDER SETTING TRIAL ISSUED FOR JUL-29-1996 AT 05:30 PM IN DEPT C
DEBTOR'S REQUEST FOR SATISFACTION OF JUDGMENT GRANTED AS TO DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE HIGHWAY&TRANSPORTATION DISTRICT
CERT MAIL TO GENE REXRODE SECRETARY TO DISTRICT GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE HIGHWAY & TRANSPORTATION DIST. RETURNED SIGNED.

THE COURT HAS ORDERED THE FOLLOWING JUDGMENT ENTERED: IT IS ADJUDGED THAT PLAINTIFF TORGERSON ROBERT RECOVER FROM DEFENDANT GOLDEN GATE BRIDGE HIGHWAY&TRANSPORTATION DISTRICT $1,000.00 PRINCIPAL, $21.00 COSTS, TOTAL JUDGMENT $1,021.00 STAY OF EXECUTION 30 DAYS
SERVICE OF COMPLAINT BY CERTIFIED MAIL
SMALL CLAIMS DISPOSITION JUL-29-1996, AUTOMATIC CONTINUANCE PER REQUEST TO AUG-13-1996 AT 10:00 AM IN DEPT C
